output: {"match_id":"m003","winner":"B","rationale":"Both target redundant tool invocation, but B is clearer and more broadly diagnostic: it isolates a pure arithmetic/scenario task where all needed data is already in context, making any recheck plainly wasteful. A has richer stale-context signals and realism, but its claim that no deploy can have occurred without a row is an extra assumption. Pilot means also favor B on the target dim (3.2 vs 2.8)."}
